payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Partial white-painted wooden rectangular picture frame with a light mat showing a small seascape image (blue sky, pale blue water and an orange-brown pier or structure); lower-right of the frame is occluded by a diagonal dark wooden banister and the frame is edge-cropped in the crop image, with visible glass reflection — estimated distance ~1.5 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"picture frame","short_description":"white wood picture frame, partial","long_description":"Partial white-painted wooden rectangular picture frame with a light mat showing a small seascape image (blue sky, pale blue water and an orange-brown pier or structure); lower-right of the frame is occluded by a diagonal dark wooden banister and the frame is edge-cropped in the crop image, with visible glass reflection — estimated distance ~1.5 m from the camera.","attributes":["white-painted wood frame","rectangular","light/off-white mat","seascape artwork (blue sky, water)","orange-brown pier/structure","glass reflection","partial/edge-cropped","occluded by diagonal wooden banister","small wall picture"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.5}
